item.title: Did you know: Black cats can appear slightly different shades in sunlight. Some look brownish or “rusty” because of how their fur pigment reacts to light and sun exposure! #fyp #ranking #funnyanimals #catsoftiktok #blackcat
item.description: By @1anirank1: Did you know: Black cats can appear slightly different shades in sunlight. Some look brownish or “rusty” because of how their fur pigment reacts to light and sun exposure! #fyp #ranking #funnyanimals #catsoftiktok #blackcat
